## Checklist

- [ ] Tested locally on Android or iOS
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes with no errors
- [ ] No hardcoded colors — uses theme values from `C.*`
- [ ] No `console.log` left in production code
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or secrets in any file
- [ ] PR targets `main` branch
- [ ] Title follows format: `type: short description` (e.g., `feat: add haptic feedback`)
